calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Stern, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Plaintiff's Witness Julie Anderson was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Dennis Clay and Clara Saenzpardo.
Default has been entered as to Co-Defendant Clara Saenzpardo.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants Dennis Clay and Clara Saenzpardo for Judgment as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 350 Arballo Drive #7D, San Francisco, San Francisco, CA. 94132
Back-due rent and damages $8,986.71 for a Total of $8,986.71
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Park Merced Investors Properties is present. Represented by, Julie Anderson.
Attorney, Daniel Stern is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dennis Clay is not present.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of September 24, 2012 remains on calendar.
